selection_rule: The user selects masculine, feminine or neutral/editorial before camera or upload. Sex and gender are never inferred.

feminine.normalization: The low-confidence pixel proxy is used only when available. Otherwise its weight is excluded and measured weights are normalized.

neutral_editorial.normalization: The facial luminance contrast proxy is used only when pixels are available. Styling remains unmeasured.

penalty_rule.score: mode_weighted_score converted to 1-8 minus only applied measurable penalties

tier_ranges.shared: Sub-3 / Very Low Tier; dehumanizing forum labels omitted

measurement_limits: Percent scores are internal heuristic alignment, not population percentiles.
Chin projection, deep-set eyes, hunter eyes, jaw structure and cheekbones are labeled as 2D visual proxies where appropriate.
Skin-surface uniformity and facial contrast use low-confidence pixel proxies that vary with lighting, makeup, camera and compression; they do not measure skin health.
Hair occlusion, beard occlusion, body fat, makeup, styling and facial contrast are not guessed from landmarks.
Gonial angle, ramus length, orbital vector and cervicomental angle are not claimed from a frontal webcam image.
No output predicts identity, personality, health, ancestry or universal attractiveness.
